mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "member.id", a.phone AS "phone", a.content AS "content", a.images AS "images", a.reply AS "reply", a.reply_date AS "replyDate", a.status AS "status", a.reward_amount AS "rewardAmount", a.is_reward AS "isReward", a.create_date AS "createDate",
member.phone AS "member.phone", member.nickname AS "member.nickname", member.idno AS "member.idno", member.lianghao AS "member.lianghao"
LEFT JOIN t_member member ON member.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_feedback( id, uid, phone, content, images, create_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{member.id}, #{phone}, #{content}, #{images}, #{createDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_feedback SET uid = #{member.id}, phone = #{phone}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, reply = #{reply}, reply_date = #{replyDate}, status = #{status}, reward_amount = #{rewardAmount}, is_reward = #{isReward} WHERE id = #{id}
